title: OracleDiagnosis
description: Structured diagnosis returned by the Claude Vision architect oracle for a single plan-extract-v2 run. Captures observable defects in the rendered overlay (slivers, fragments, mis-hosted openings, etc.) so a downstream filter pass can address them.

run_id.description: The run_id copied verbatim from observed_model.json. Lets diagnoses be cross-referenced with their source run.

summary.description: One-paragraph overall assessment of the run's geometric/topological health. Plain prose, no markdown.

defects.description: List of the most actionable defects observed in the overlay image. Aim for 5-15 items, ordered roughly by severity.

element_id.description: Identifier of the offending element. Should match an id present in observed_model.json (e.g. 'room-12', 'wall-83', 'opening-5'). Use 'global' for run-wide issues.

element_type.description: Which collection in observed_model.json the element_id refers to.

defect_kind.description: Coarse taxonomy of the observed defect.

severity.description: How much this defect inflates the model or distorts downstream stages.

hypothesis.description: Geometric/topological reasoning for what likely caused the defect (e.g. 'snap_tolerance too small leaves a gap that polygonize closes as a triangle').

suggested_fix.description: Concrete code change or filter the pipeline could apply to address the defect (e.g. 'drop rooms with area < 0.4 m^2 or aspect_ratio > 8').
